mapper.sql: id, from_user_id, to_user_id, status, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO contact_requests (from_user_id, to_user_id, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{fromUserId}, #{toUserId}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE contact_requests SET from_user_id = #{fromUserId}, to_user_id = #{toUserId}, status = #{status}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE contact_requests SET status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT cr.id, cr.from_user_id, cr.to_user_id, cr.status, cr.created_at, cr.updated_at, u.email, u.nick_name FROM contact_requests cr LEFT JOIN user_info u ON cr.to_user_id = u.id WHERE cr.to_user_id = #{toUserId}
